clues.clue_text: Hopeless from the start, for short
Europa, Ganymede or Callisto vis-à-vis Jupiter
Most common last name in Somalia
Title woman in a 1965 Beach Boys hit

___ on a log (celery-stick snack studded with raisins)
What may be right but not left?
Tree branch or power line, for a bird
